TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O pisanga' no 'Amis to loma' i,misi'ayaw to kasadakan no cidal. O pipawalian to panay ko sakapihaen nawhani, i i'ayaw no loma' ko potal ta caay ka 'ading ko pipawalian to panay. O satapangan no pisaloma' i, misongila' to sera to malopipatirengan to loma'. Lopayenho nangara ko sota'. O sapisaloma' to loma' no 'Amis o kilang,o 'aol,o penen, o folo'. Pili'en ko rakes a kilang to malo hecek no loma'.Onini a rakes a kilang i,caay ka kaen no 'aayad.Karkaren nangra ko sera a misatalolong to saka tanektek no katomireng no hecek.Mapateli i sepatay a toko ko safalat a 'alinonong('anonong) a kilang. misaloma' a serangawan no 'Amis Ma'oripay itini i Taiwan a Yin-cu-min, Masasiroma koni patireng to loma', Tinako o 'Amis a finacadan itira i dahetal a patireng to loma', o i ngata'ay a lotok a kilang ato 'a'ol fulo' fitunay 'eli' ato 'oway ko sapi saloma'; ono Manowan a finacadan itini i lotolotokan a patireng to loma', o masa sapaday a fokeloh ato kilang ato 'oway ko sapi saloma'; ono Fotod a finacadan itira i kasa 'apilis a mi korkor to paloma'an o fokeloh sapi taring malo patih, o kilang ko hecek o 'eli' ko sapi fadahong, ta: da mahapinang ko taneng no Yin-cu-min a mafana' mikitado to mata todongay sapi saloma' a kalomaan a losay. O sefi, loma', pikacawan, pakolongan, cukep, demi' no 'Amis, saheto o kilang o 'a'ol o 'eli' ato 'oway ko sapi patireng, o na sapi simsim mi kilim ato mi pili', o taneng no to'as no 'Amis konini, o maan a kilang ko a lohecek? O maan a 'a'olan ko malo dayna? Maanen ko pifalod ta makedec tanektek? Ma 'emin mateli mana'ang i fongoh no mato'asay, onini saheto o papalifeten no mita a minanam a mifana', Aka tawalen no mita, mala sawadaw ko fenek no to'as a patireng to loma'. O kapah o pakarongay no 'Amis pakayni i pisaloma' mifuting ato mitilo ko saka lafainayan, mifuting ato mitilo o sapa ka'en to paro no loma', fainayan a tamdaw mafana' misanga' to kalomaan a sakatayal, mafana' misacaki, mafana' misakanas, mafana' misatapila', kasaloma'an mafana' a mipalimaw misanga' to paliding, 'epip no wawa, o saka tayal no ina i demi' a kaliling, tepi, 'alapit, sakahir, todong no malakadafuay a misa 'icel patireng to parod. Misaloma', misa'ariri', misanga' topikacawan ato misasefi sahto no finawlan malacecay amipatireng, todongay o malacecayay ko 'orip sanay a serangawan, o polong fainayan a tamdaw nani pakarongay tangasa i mato'asay ma'emin a mikihatiya matayal, itini inipisakilang a pasifana' komato'asay to kapah maanen ko nipisimsim to kilang, maanen ko nipi'oway, Adihay ko limo'ot a papina'on to kapah to tayal, yo malepon ko tayal to no romi'adan. Isa sifoan no lafi' pacecay heca a pakimad ko mato'asay amipa 'icel to kasaselal ato palimo'ot to rayray no tayal ano dafak, itini i limo'ot ato kimad no mato'asay malahad cicefad ko taneng no fainayan a tamdaw, mangalef mangalef koka aredet no kimad no kapah no finawlan.
S.PHON: o~u pisaŇča ° no~u °amis to~u …ĺo~uma ° i,misi °ajaw to~u kasa…¨~…ģakan no~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ. o~u pipawa…ĺian to~u panaj ko~u sakapińßa…ôn nawńßani, i i °ajaw no~u …ĺo~uma ° ko~u po~uta…ĺ ta ¶aaj ka °a…¨~…ģiŇč ko~u pipawa…ĺian to~u panaj. o~u satapaŇčan no~u pisa…ĺo~uma ° i, miso~uŇči…ĺa ° to~u s…ôra to~u ma…ĺo~upipatir…ôŇčan to~u …ĺo~uma °. …ĺo~upaj…ônńßo~u naŇčara ko~u so~uta °. o~u sapisa…ĺo~uma ° to~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u °amis o~u ki…ĺaŇč,o~u °ao~u…ĺ,o~u p…ôn…ôn, o~u fo~u…ĺo~u °. pi…ĺi °…ôn ko~u rak…ôs a ki…ĺaŇč to~u ma…ĺo~u ńß…ô ¶…ôk no~u …ĺo~uma °.o~unini a rak…ôs a ki…ĺaŇč i, ¶aaj ka ka…ôn no~u °aaja…¨~…ģ.karkar…ôn naŇčra ko~u s…ôra a misata…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇč to~u saka tan…ôkt…ôk no~u kato~umir…ôŇč no~u ńß…ô ¶…ôk.mapat…ô…ĺi i s…ôpataj a to~uko~u ko~u safa…ĺat a °a…ĺino~uno~uŇč( °ano~uno~uŇč) a ki…ĺaŇč. misa…ĺo~uma ° a s…ôraŇčawan no~u °amis ma °o~uripaj itini i taiwan a jin- ¶o~u~u-min, masasiro~uma ko~uni patir…ôŇč to~u …ĺo~uma °, tinako~u o~u °amis a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan itira i …¨~…ģańß…ôta…ĺ a patir…ôŇč to~u …ĺo~uma °, o~u i Ňčata °aj a …ĺo~uto~uk a ki…ĺaŇč ato~u °a °o~u…ĺ fo~u~u…ĺo~u ° fito~u~unaj °…ô…ĺi ° ato~u °o~uwaj ko~u sapi sa…ĺo~uma °; o~uno~u mano~uwan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan itini i …ĺo~uto~u…ĺo~uto~ukan a patir…ôŇč to~u …ĺo~uma °, o~u masa sapa…¨~…ģaj a fo~uk…ô…ĺo~uńß ato~u ki…ĺaŇč ato~u °o~uwaj ko~u sapi sa…ĺo~uma °; o~uno~u fo~uto~u…¨~…ģ a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan itira i kasa °api…ĺis a mi ko~urko~ur to~u pa…ĺo~uma °an o~u fo~uk…ô…ĺo~uńß sapi tariŇč ma…ĺo~u patińß, o~u ki…ĺaŇč ko~u ńß…ô ¶…ôk o~u °…ô…ĺi ° ko~u sapi fa…¨~…ģańßo~uŇč, ta: …¨~…ģa mańßapinaŇč ko~u tan…ôŇč no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-min a mafana ° mikita…¨~…ģo~u to~u mata to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj sapi sa…ĺo~uma ° a ka…ĺo~umaan a …ĺo~usaj. o~u s…ôfi, …ĺo~uma °, pika ¶awan, pako~u…ĺo~uŇčan, ¶o~u~uk…ôp, …¨~…ģ…ômi ° no~u °amis, sańß…ôto~u o~u ki…ĺaŇč o~u °a °o~u…ĺ o~u °…ô…ĺi ° ato~u °o~uwaj ko~u sapi patir…ôŇč, o~u na sapi simsim mi ki…ĺim ato~u mi pi…ĺi °, o~u tan…ôŇč no~u to~u °as no~u °amis ko~unini, o~u maan a ki…ĺaŇč ko~u a …ĺo~uńß…ô ¶…ôk? o~u maan a °a °o~u…ĺan ko~u ma…ĺo~u …¨~…ģajna? maan…ôn ko~u pifa…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ ta mak…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶ tan…ôkt…ôk? ma °…ômin mat…ô…ĺi mana °aŇč i fo~uŇčo~uńß no~u mato~u °asaj, o~unini sańß…ôto~u o~u papa…ĺif…ôt…ôn no~u mita a minanam a mifana °, aka tawa…ĺ…ôn no~u mita, ma…ĺa sawa…¨~…ģaw ko~u f…ôn…ôk no~u to~u °as a patir…ôŇč to~u …ĺo~uma °. o~u kapańß o~u pakaro~uŇčaj no~u °amis pakajni i pisa…ĺo~uma ° mifo~u~utiŇč ato~u miti…ĺo~u ko~u saka …ĺafainajan, mifo~u~utiŇč ato~u miti…ĺo~u o~u sapa ka °…ôn to~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma °, fainajan a tam…¨~…ģaw mafana ° misaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~umaan a sakataja…ĺ, mafana ° misa ¶aki, mafana ° misakanas, mafana ° misatapi…ĺa °, kasa…ĺo~uma °an mafana ° a mipa…ĺimaw misaŇča ° to~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč, °…ôpip no~u wawa, o~u saka taja…ĺ no~u ina i …¨~…ģ…ômi ° a ka…ĺi…ĺiŇč, t…ôpi, °a…ĺapit, sakańßir, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u ma…ĺaka…¨~…ģafo~u~uaj a misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ patir…ôŇč to~u paro~u…¨~…ģ. misa…ĺo~uma °, misa °ariri °, misaŇča ° to~upika ¶awan ato~u misas…ôfi sańßto~u no~u finaw…ĺan ma…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj amipatir…ôŇč, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u ma…ĺa ¶…ô ¶ajaj ko~u °o~urip sanaj a s…ôraŇčawan, o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč fainajan a tam…¨~…ģaw nani pakaro~uŇčaj taŇčasa i mato~u °asaj ma °…ômin a mikińßatija mataja…ĺ, itini inipisaki…ĺaŇč a pasifana ° ko~umato~u °asaj to~u kapańß maan…ôn ko~u nipisimsim to~u ki…ĺaŇč, maan…ôn ko~u nipi °o~uwaj, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u …ĺimo~u °o~ut a papina °o~un to~u kapańß to~u taja…ĺ, jo~u ma…ĺ…ôpo~un ko~u taja…ĺ to~u no~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģan. isa sifo~uan no~u …ĺafi ° pa ¶…ô ¶aj ńß…ô ¶a a pakima…¨~…ģ ko~u mato~u °asaj amipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ ato~u pa…ĺimo~u °o~ut to~u rajraj no~u taja…ĺ ano~u …¨~…ģafak, itini i …ĺimo~u °o~ut ato~u kima…¨~…ģ no~u mato~u °asaj ma…ĺańßa…¨~…ģ ¶i ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģ ko~u tan…ôŇč no~u fainajan a tam…¨~…ģaw, maŇča…ĺ…ôf maŇča…ĺ…ôf ko~uka ar…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u kima…¨~…ģ no~u kapańß no~u finaw…ĺan.
S.FORM: O pisanga' no 'Amis to loma' i,misi'ayaw to kasadakan no cidal. O pipawalian to panay ko sakapihaen nawhani, i i'ayaw no loma' ko potal ta caay ka 'ading ko pipawalian to panay. O satapangan no pisaloma' i, misongila' to sera to malopipatirengan to loma'. Lopayenho nangara ko sota'. O sapisaloma' to loma' no 'Amis o kilang,o 'aol,o penen, o folo'. Pili'en ko rakes a kilang to malo hecek no loma'.Onini a rakes a kilang i,caay ka kaen no 'aayad.Karkaren nangra ko sera a misatalolong to saka tanektek no katomireng no hecek.Mapateli i sepatay a toko ko safalat a 'alinonong('anonong) a kilang. misaloma' a serangawan no 'Amis Ma'oripay itini i Taiwan a Yin-cu-min, Masasiroma koni patireng to loma', Tinako o 'Amis a finacadan itira i dahetal a patireng to loma', o i ngata'ay a lotok a kilang ato 'a'ol fulo' fitunay 'eli' ato 'oway ko sapi saloma'; ono Manowan a finacadan itini i lotolotokan a patireng to loma', o masa sapaday a fokeloh ato kilang ato 'oway ko sapi saloma'; ono Fotod a finacadan itira i kasa 'apilis a mi korkor to paloma'an o fokeloh sapi taring malo patih, o kilang ko hecek o 'eli' ko sapi fadahong, ta: da mahapinang ko taneng no Yin-cu-min a mafana' mikitado to mata todongay sapi saloma' a kalomaan a losay. O sefi, loma', pikacawan, pakolongan, cukep, demi' no 'Amis, saheto o kilang o 'a'ol o 'eli' ato 'oway ko sapi patireng, o na sapi simsim mi kilim ato mi pili', o taneng no to'as no 'Amis konini, o maan a kilang ko a lohecek? O maan a 'a'olan ko malo dayna? Maanen ko pifalod ta makedec tanektek? Ma 'emin mateli mana'ang i fongoh no mato'asay, onini saheto o papalifeten no mita a minanam a mifana', Aka tawalen no mita, mala sawadaw ko fenek no to'as a patireng to loma'. O kapah o pakarongay no 'Amis pakayni i pisaloma' mifuting ato mitilo ko saka lafainayan, mifuting ato mitilo o sapa ka'en to paro no loma', fainayan a tamdaw mafana' misanga' to kalomaan a sakatayal, mafana' misacaki, mafana' misakanas, mafana' misatapila', kasaloma'an mafana' a mipalimaw misanga' to paliding, 'epip no wawa, o saka tayal no ina i demi' a kaliling, tepi, 'alapit, sakahir, todong no malakadafuay a misa 'icel patireng to parod. Misaloma', misa'ariri', misanga' topikacawan ato misasefi sahto no finawlan malacecay amipatireng, todongay o malacecayay ko 'orip sanay a serangawan, o polong fainayan a tamdaw nani pakarongay tangasa i mato'asay ma'emin a mikihatiya matayal, itini inipisakilang a pasifana' komato'asay to kapah maanen ko nipisimsim to kilang, maanen ko nipi'oway, Adihay ko limo'ot a papina'on to kapah to tayal, yo malepon ko tayal to no romi'adan. Isa sifoan no lafi' pacecay heca a pakimad ko mato'asay amipa 'icel to kasaselal ato palimo'ot to rayray no tayal ano dafak, itini i limo'ot ato kimad no mato'asay malahad cicefad ko taneng no fainayan a tamdaw, mangalef mangalef koka aredet no kimad no kapah no finawlan.

itira i kasa °api…ĺis a mi ko~urko~ur to~u pa…ĺo~uma °an o~u fo~uk…ô…ĺo~uńß sapi tariŇč ma…ĺo~u patińß, o~u ki…ĺaŇč ko~u ńß…ô ¶…ôk o~u °…ô…ĺi ° ko~u sapi fa…¨~…ģańßo~uŇč, ta: …¨~…ģa mańßapinaŇč ko~u tan…ôŇč no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-min a mafana ° mikita…¨~…ģo~u to~u mata to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj sapi sa…ĺo~uma ° a ka…ĺo~umaan a …ĺo~usaj. o~u s…ôfi, …ĺo~uma °, pika ¶awan, pako~u…ĺo~uŇčan, ¶o~u~uk…ôp, …¨~…ģ…ômi ° a tam…¨~…ģaw, maŇča…ĺ…ôf maŇča…ĺ…ôf ko~uka ar…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u kima…¨~…ģ no~u kapańß no~u finaw…ĺan.
